classification_rationale: The issue-2742 manifest and dry-run command expansion define the next clearance-targeted successor, but no runtime hard-slice clearance evidence was produced in this PR.
hypothesis: Progress-gated topology reselection can clear the non-canonical hard slices that remained horizon_exhausted in issue #2716.
stop_rule: Classify stop or revise if progress-gated reselection loses topology-command influence on any hard slice, worsens negative-control switching, or only changes route labels without route-progress or terminal-outcome signal.
promote_rule: Promotion requires every hard slice to have at least one progress-gated terminal success and the negative-control slice to show zero topology switching.

dry_run.durability: the local dry-run report is disposable; this summary is the tracked durable launch-packet record
